Spreadsheets and Emails with SQL & ACS.s.filename: Spreadsheets and Emails with SQL & ACS.sql

description: In this Gist, I show how you can leverage ACS's jar that is shipped on your IBM i to do your bidding. In this case, we can automate the creation and downloading of a spreadsheet to an IFS file where the contents of the spreadsheet is controlled with an SQL query.  After the spreadsheet is created in the IFS, we use SQL once more to email the spreadsheet as an attachment to an interested party.
